creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Helmut Ritter from comment #4)
Yes, this is fine:

fernape@beastie:~/FreeBSD-repos/ports/www/typo3-11$ file ~/build_www_typo3-11_2021-11-08-13-24.diff ~/Downloads/file_259713.txt 
/home/fernape/build_www_typo3-11_2021-11-08-13-24.diff: unified diff output, ASCII text
/home/fernape/Downloads/file_259713.txt:                unified diff output, ASCII text, with CRLF line terminators

Thanks!
